info.english_meaning: to remove to get rid of to hide to keep out of sight
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: svaritet  ' balIBavati prARIBavati apavArayati vA ityarTaH ' - kOmudI  ' yO vA RAvapavAraRe Cadata ityekaM  dvitIyaM Cadet (Cadan) anyat CAdayati Cadediti punaH syAdUrjanerTe mitaH  yastu cCandayatIti RO numi padaM tat saMvftAvizyate ' (Slo. 113) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: Apa॰SrO॰1.2.8.24 ityatrEza prayogo dfSyate- 'putramivEnamanukANkzan sarvaDarmezvanapacCAdayamAnaH' aparacCAdiratra piDAnasyApAkaraRe vartate anapacCAdayamAnaH kiYcidapyagUhamAnaH

'dikkAlAdyanavacCinnAnantacinmAtramUrtaye svAnuBUtyekamAnAya namaH SAntAya tejase' (Bartf0 21).. anavacCinnaH=aparicCinnaH=aparimitaH=anavaDiH GawatvAvacCinno GawaH Gawatvena DarmeRa pawAdiByo Binna ityarTaH
'Gnanti tvevEnaM bicCAdayantIva' (CAM0 u0 8102) idaM DftapUrvaM pustake arTastu na niradeSIti sa nirdiSyate vicCAdayantIva vidrAvayantIva
'snApakocCAdakA vEdyAH' (rA0 28614) ucCAdakA aNgamardakAH ucCAdanaM samulleKodvAhanodvartanezu ceti viSvaH
'bAlA eva tAstyaktvA vErAgyeRa piturgfham SmaSAnaM SiSriyuH pfzwA jagaduSca paricCadam' (kaTA0 2814)..
'paricCanno yayO pArTo BrAtfBiH saha pARqavaH' (BA0 saBA0 5920) paricCannaH saparicCadaH
'pragalBAScAnuraktASca te tava syuH paricCadAH' (BA0 SAM0 836) paricCadAH senAnyAdayaH (nIla0)
'vidyAlayaM sitagfhaM saparicCadaM tat' (budDa0 ) paricCado vitAnamullocaH candrodayaH
'darSanIyAstu kAmbojAH SukapatraparicCadAH' (BA0 droRa0 237) SukapatrABaromARa iti nIla0 patraM pakzaH
